top_signals.title: Thin end of the wedge? LLPs brace for major tax overhaul
top_signals.summary: The maths genius behind trading firm XTX, Alex Gerko, stands high in the rankings of Britain’s top taxpayers, having paid more than £330m to HMRC last year. For good measure, he also handed out more than £150m to charities and good causes in 2025, focusing on education and supporting talented math graduates to pursue PhDs [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Messier comms could help big business regain public trust
top_signals.summary: To regain public trust, businesses must ditch the glossy, say-nothing comms and be honest with consumers about the messy reality.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nissan CEO insists alliance with Renault has never been better
top_signals.summary: Nissan CEO Ivan Espinosa has downplayed the significance of Renault abstaining from last week's vote to reappoint influential outside director Motoo Nagai.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
